title: Suggestion Chips After Empty Assistant Message

findings.description: SuggestionChips component exists and renders clickable pill-shaped chips with dismiss (X) buttons. Each chip has role='button', keyboard support (Enter/Space), and data-testid='suggestion-chip'
findings.evidence: SuggestionChips.tsx: renders flex-wrap container of chips with onSelect and onDismiss callbacks

findings.description: Suggestion logic exists in useSuggestions hook with tests
Template cards visible on empty chat screen serve as initial suggestion chips: 'Generate a dashboard layout', 'Scaffold an API integration', 'Review and optimize code'
findings.evidence: Snapshot: buttons e128, e129, e130 with template descriptions

findings.description: Cannot verify suggestion chips appearing after assistant responses due to conversation crash issue. They likely appear after empty/short assistant messages.
findings.evidence: Known issue: clicking existing conversations crashes
